scope.target: goal-plan-continuation-after-pr2 rereview for PR3 preimplementation cursor

checks_reviewed.command: source review: prior Medium finding closure
checks_reviewed.evidence: Active plan tail now says PR1 and PR2 are complete locally, PR3 through PR7 remain pending, and next mechanical action is PR3 preimplementation planning plus xhigh review.

checks_reviewed.command: source review: active/session plan cursor consistency
checks_reviewed.evidence: Active plan and session plan both limit continuation to PR3 preimplementation planning and xhigh review before PR3 implementation.

checks_reviewed.command: source review: overclaiming native/pod/live platform readiness
checks_reviewed.evidence: Plans keep live EAS, pod rollout, webhook, Secret/token, branch protection, Confluence live publish, native readiness, and customer-app readiness behind future gates or out of scope.
This rereview scope is a plan-cursor text correction. Prior PR2 implementation TDD evidence remains recorded in the checkpoint; no new implementation changes were reviewed.
No apps/mobile UI/runtime paths are in scope for this plan rereview; NativeWind, RN primitives, semantic tokens, and testID selector checks are not implicated.
No apps/api or packages/contracts paths are in scope for this plan rereview; no API contract drift was introduced.
No tracked repo diff was reported for the reviewed repo-local paths; docs/plans/active is ignored by .gitignore.

residual_risks: docs/plans/active/ is gitignored, so the corrected active cursor needs durable evidence or a tracked work-unit artifact before PR3 execution packaging.
The user-local /Users/tw.kim/.claude session plan is outside active Codex runtime and should remain advisory rather than a repo gate artifact.

This rereview relied on source review and recorded PR2 evidence; it did not rerun pnpm run test:runtime, pnpm run test:local-harness, or pnpm turbo run lint test because no implementation or PR-ready source change was reviewed.
